security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote message could be altered in transit.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote message integrity is not guaranteed.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the contract is not secure.
The attacker can intercept and modify vote messages without detection.

mitigation.strategy: Implement secure communication channels with integrity checks (e.g., TLS, digital signatures).

description: An attacker could intercept and modify a vote message before it reaches the contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of non-repudiation mechanisms for votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide mechanisms to prevent users from denying their votes.

assumptions: The system does not log vote submissions with user identity.
The system does not utilize mechanisms to prevent vote repudiation (e.g., digital signatures).

mitigation.strategy: Implement mechanisms for non-repudiation (e.g., digital signatures, secure logging).

description: A user may cast a vote and later deny having done so.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be exposed to unauthorized actors.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

assumptions: Votes are stored in a database accessible by unauthorized actors.
The system does not use encryption for vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data at rest and in transit. Implement access controls to restrict database access.

description: An attacker may gain access to sensitive information about how users voted.
